title: 20m x 15mm WOVEN EDGE WEDDING ORGANZA RIBBON - BLACK
features: Black organza ribbon that measures approximately 20 metres in length and 1.5cm in width.
Perfect for wrapping around gifts or favour boxes and tying into bows.
Ribbon has woven edge so it will not fray. Great for weddings, engagements or any occasion.
